threshold_or_rule: If monthly movement exceeds +/-12%, explain by category, channel and stock.
recommended_decision: Trigger exception commentary in the monthly trading pack.

threshold_or_rule: If margin rate falls below 45%, inspect discounting, COGS and channel mix.
what_it_means: Growth is valuable because modeled margin is still high.
recommended_decision: Protect margin-positive product mix and bundle high-margin items.

threshold_or_rule: If return rate exceeds 5%, prioritize category root-cause work before scaling media.
what_it_means: Footwear has the highest return-rate signal.
recommended_decision: Improve sizing, delivery promise, PDP content and post-purchase guidance.

threshold_or_rule: If one category exceeds 35% share, manage stockout and campaign dependency risk.
what_it_means: Apparel is a growth engine but also a concentration risk.
recommended_decision: Create availability alerts and category-specific SEO/story pages.

threshold_or_rule: Scale only when ROAS, margin and conversion all stay above threshold.
what_it_means: Paid Social is the lowest-ROAS channel and should stay experimental.
recommended_decision: Move spend toward efficient journeys; keep paid experiments controlled.

threshold_or_rule: If row counts differ from expected load by >1%, block semantic model promotion.
what_it_means: Million-row scale is loaded and traceable to OneLake/Git proof.
recommended_decision: Publish source, target, row count and commit ID in every close pack.

threshold_or_rule: If no active demo or refresh, capacity must be paused.
what_it_means: Capacity was paused after handover to protect remaining credit.
recommended_decision: Resume only for refresh/demo, then pause again.
